messages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'loading', 'loadingMore', and 'page'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [isIntersecting, loading, loadingMore, page]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchHistory'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [fetchHistory]

suppressedMessages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
